validator_assessment.weakest_link: Internals agent at 0.48 confidence with explicitly 'mixed' rotation — XLK +1.2% strength could broaden into risk-on rather than narrow leadership reversal, collapsing the bearish sector read.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: VIX drops below 18.5 within first 30 minutes of RTH — fear reverses, macro bearish case collapses, clean calendar enables a gap-fill rally to PMH 711.21.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 706.49 on first test (does not break below PML) — bear ribbon intact + price stays below 708.22

secondary.condition: if SPY reclaims above 708.22 and retests PMH 711.21 — gap-fill scenario takes over

invalidation.condition: VIX drops below 18.5 within the first 30 minutes of RTH — fear dissipates on clean calendar, XLK strength broadens, gap-fill to PMH 711.21 becomes base case
invalidation.effect: Macro bearish case collapses simultaneously with level-thesis primary scenario. Bears lose all three structural pillars (VIX, ribbon sentiment, gap persistence). Positions should be re-evaluated if VIX prints below 18.5 before 10:00 ET.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests PML 706.49 within the first 90 minutes of RTH (by 11:00 ET) — price currently 1.27 above this level with bear ribbon fully formed and overnight gap-down of $3.45 supporting downside continuation.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 706.49 before 11:00 ET, instead holding above 708.22 for the first 60 min and forming a higher low — confirming consolidation rather than breakdown.

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 19.0 through 10:30 ET (first 60 minutes of RTH), sustaining the risk-off backdrop — consistent with MID regime VIX rising +3.09% pre-market and zero macro events to catalyze a reversal.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX prints below 18.5 on any 5-minute bar before 10:30 ET, collapsing the fear premium and reversing the macro bearish case.

swarm_predictions.claim: The CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (spread ≥ 30 cents) holds through the first 30 minutes of RTH — the 09:35 ET 5-minute bar closes below the pivot EMA at 708.01, confirming bearish structure survives the open.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes above pivot 708.01 on the 09:35 ET bar, inverting the ribbon alignment and shifting bar structure from strong_bear to reversal — the 05:55 doji would then complete as a reversal pattern.

synthesis_narrative: A rare 4-of-4 specialist unanimity for bearish sets up today with maximum structural conviction — CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (77-cent spread), $3.45 overnight gap-down, VIX rising to 19.32, and no macro events to disrupt the thesis. However, the validator correctly marks robustness only 'moderate': the three invalidation paths (VIX reversal, XLK strength broadening, modest gap-fill on clean calendar) all converge simultaneously if any one fires, collapsing the thesis on all fronts at once. The single most important thing to watch at the open: does VIX hold above 19.0 while SPY approaches PML 706.49? If VIX drops below 18.5 while SPY lifts above 708.22, the bear case is off — if VIX holds and 706.49 breaks, the path to Carry support 698.53 is open.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon 77¢ spread (slow 708.61 > pivot 708.01 > fast 707.84); price 25¢ below pivot; overnight gap down $3.45; strong_bear bar structure with 05:55 doji as only tempering factor.

macro.one_line: VIX MID regime rising +3.09% to 19.32; zero events today; overnight gap -$3.45 (-0.48%); mixed sector rotation (XLK +1.2%, XLF -0.51%) provides some friction but overall macro is risk_off.

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level PML 706.49 just 1.27 below price — hold test determines bear continuation to Carry 698.53 (-9.23) vs. reclaim rally to PMH 711.21 (+3.45); asymmetry favors downside with bear ribbon aligned.

internals.one_line: Mixed rotation (XLK +1.2% outperforming, XLF -0.51% dragging) — narrow tech leadership with SPY underperforming at +0.29%; breadth pattern is consensus weakest link with genuine bull-reversal optionality.

validator.top_invalidation: VIX drops below 18.5 in first 30 min + clean calendar enables gap-fill to 711.21 — all three bearish pillars collapse simultaneously if this fires.
